_comment: Panel config, lives at /etc/proxy-admin/config.json on the server. Generated by install.sh — this is just a reference. Do NOT commit a real one.
_server_ip_comment: Optional. The raw IP behind server_host. Set it so the panel's Config page can hand out an IP-based config (desktop Clash under TUN often can't resolve the domain). If omitted, the panel resolves server_host at runtime.
_upstream_comment: Optional. Omit the whole 'upstream' key to exit directly from the VPS. With it, all traffic chains through this SOCKS5/HTTP proxy (e.g. a residential exit).
